headline: Is SASE Emerging as a Key Growth Driver for Palo Alto Networks?
summary: PANW is seeing SASE emerge as a major growth engine, driven by strong customer demand and expanding platform adoption.

headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Partners with NVIDIA (NVDA) to Accelerate GPU-Powered AI Security
summary: Fortinet Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) is one of the 12 Best Growth Stocks Trading in Oversold Territory. On May 12, Fortinet partnered with NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) to accelerate the FortiAIGate solution, providing high-performance, GPU-accelerated security for AI workloads. This integration protects data and autonomous agents in data centers and the cloud, allowing organizations to monitor AI usage and […]
